svg.text: Sahayaa AI Support Ticket Management System - Architecture
• Multi-tenant architecture with complete data isolation
• Microservices design with FastMCP service for AI operations and vector storage
• Multi-provider AI system (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, AWS Bedrock) with intelligent agent orchestration
• Production-ready security with RBAC, MFA, encryption, and comprehensive monitoring
• Embeddable chat widget with cross-origin support and real-time ticket processing
